title: Dawnhold
description:
OverviewDawnhold is a top-down action base-defense game about protecting the Sunstone, the last source of light in a world overrun by the Hollowborn.

Gather resources, build walls and towers, fight enemy waves, and push outward from your base to assault Hollowborn strongholds. Each mission starts fresh, challenging you to balance building, gathering, combat, upgrades, and boss fights before the pressure becomes too much.

Survival is only part of the mission. To win, you’ll need to leave the safety of your defenses, break through the Hollowborn’s forces, and defeat the powerful bosses.

MissionsIn Standard missions, you defend the Sunstone while expanding your defenses and pushing toward the enemy stronghold. Build your base, survive repeated attacks, and choose when to go on the offensive.

Arena missions offer a more direct combat challenge, sending you into focused battles against waves of Hollowborn enemies.

As you progress through the campaign, you’ll earn currencies used to unlock and enhance abilities, walls, towers, and powerful upgrades.

Features• Top-down action combat mixed with base building and tower defense

• Build walls and towers to protect the Sunstone

• Fight directly as the hero with class-based abilities

• Choose from 3 playable classes, each with distinct strengths and playstyles

• Survive repeated enemy waves while preparing your next push

• Assault Hollowborn strongholds and defeat powerful bosses

• Unlock abilities, buildings, and upgrades across the campaign

• Replayable missions with different strategies and approaches
description_short: Dawnhold is a top-down action base-defense game where you gather resources, build up your defenses, and survive relentless enemy waves. Strike back by assaulting enemy strongholds and defeating powerful bosses in a fight to protect the Sunstone.
